title: Roll out a new cache safely
description: Shadow-compare cached against origin values, ramp traffic, and keep a bypass switch.
body: Steps: 1. Add the cache in read-through-but-verify mode, comparing cached and origin values on a sample. 2. Watch for mismatches that reveal a missing key input or stale invalidation. 3. Ramp the fraction of traffic served from cache gradually. 4. Confirm origin load drops while error rate stays flat. 5. Keep a kill switch that bypasses the cache instantly. Rollback point: flip the bypass switch to read directly from origin. Validation: sampled cached values match origin throughout the ramp.
